disclosure_label: Northset contributed this fix and ran its declared checks. Contributor self-run. Not maintainer verification.

repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: Kaoto permits AI-assisted contributions but requires human review, approval, signing, and responsibility. Contributors must use their own fork and branch, stay under 10 PRs per operator per day, follow up within two weeks, and run UI lint, style lint, and tests before submission. AI-use disclosure is optional but recommended.

limitations: The focused regression exercises Canvas remount lifecycle behavior with a shared visualization controller but does not navigate the full application router in a browser.
Contributor self-run record of Northset's own contribution; not the maintainer's verification.
